prose.en: Transfer predictive maintenance data to a maintenance management system using {param:ma-06.03_odp}.

guidance.en: A computerized maintenance management system maintains a database of information about the maintenance operations of organizations and automates the processing of equipment condition data to trigger maintenance planning, execution, and reporting.

prose.en: predictive maintenance data is transferred to a maintenance management system using {param:ma-06.03_odp}.

objects.en: list of system components requiring predictive maintenance
Organizational personnel with system maintenance responsibilities
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Automated mechanisms implementing the transfer of predictive maintenance data to a computerized maintenance management system
operations of the computer maintenance management system

guidelines.en: automated mechanisms used to transfer predictive maintenance data to a maintenance management system are defined;
